models.subscriptionPlans: The available subscription tiers that users can choose from during onboarding. Each plan defines vehicle limits, incident coverage, support levels, and pricing.
models.onboardingState: Tracks the user's progress through the onboarding flow, including which step they're on and what data they've completed.
models.formExamples: Sample data showing what completed forms would look like for design purposes. These are examples only - actual onboarding forms start empty.
models.validationErrors: Example error messages that appear when validation fails at each step of the onboarding process.
models.uiStates: Different UI states for loading, success, and error scenarios during the onboarding flow.

relationships: Each Subscription Plan has specific feature limits and pricing tiers
Onboarding State tracks progress through Sign Up → Add Vehicle → Add Driver → Choose Plan
Form Examples demonstrate what user-entered data looks like for design mockups
Validation Errors link to specific form fields and steps in the onboarding flow

subscriptionPlans.name: U Drive+
subscriptionPlans.description: Complete protection for individual vehicle owners

subscriptionPlans.name: Enterprise
subscriptionPlans.description: Custom fleet solutions for large organizations

onboardingSteps.name: Sign Up
onboardingSteps.title: Verify your phone number
onboardingSteps.description: We'll send you a one-time password to verify your account

onboardingSteps.name: Add Vehicle
onboardingSteps.title: Add your first vehicle
onboardingSteps.description: Enter your RC number to get started with compliance tracking

onboardingSteps.name: Add Driver
onboardingSteps.title: Add a driver (optional)
onboardingSteps.description: Assign a driver to track license compliance and incidents

onboardingSteps.name: Choose Plan
onboardingSteps.title: Select your subscription plan
onboardingSteps.description: Choose the plan that best fits your needs

phoneNumber.invalid: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number
phoneNumber.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
phoneNumber.alreadyExists: This phone number is already registered. Please log in instead.

otp.invalid: The OTP you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
otp.expired: This OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
otp.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please request a new OTP.

vehicle.duplicateRC: This vehicle is already registered in your account.
vehicle.invalidRC: Please enter a valid RC number (e.g., DL03AF1234)
vehicle.apiFailed: Unable to fetch vehicle details. Please enter manually.
vehicle.requiredFields: Please fill in all required vehicle details.

driver.invalidLicense: Please enter a valid driving license number
driver.requiredFields: Driver name and license number are required

payment.failed: Payment failed. Please try again or use a different payment method.
payment.timeout: Payment request timed out. Please try again.
payment.declined: Your payment was declined. Please check your card details.

vehicleFetching.subMessage: This may take a few seconds

vehicleFetchFailed.fallbackMessage: Please enter your vehicle details manually

paymentProcessing.subMessage: Please do not close this window
